tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Monkey D. Luffy is the captain of the Straw Hat Pirates and the main protagonist of One Piece.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Luffy gained rubber powers after eating the Gum-Gum Devil Fruit and can stretch his body in combat.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Luffy's dream is to find the legendary treasure called One Piece and become the Pirate King.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Roronoa Zoro is the combatant of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the strongest swordsmen in the crew.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Zoro uses a unique three-sword fighting style and possesses immense physical strength.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Zoro dreams of becoming the greatest swordsman in the world.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Nami is the navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates and a master of weather prediction.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: She uses the Clima-Tact weapon to manipulate weather during battles.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Nami has exceptional map-making skills and navigation abilities.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Sanji is the cook of the Straw Hat Pirates and a powerful martial artist.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Sanji fights using powerful kicks and incredible speed.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Sanji refuses to fight women and values chivalry highly.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Trafalgar Law is the captain of the Heart Pirates and a powerful pirate doctor.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: His Devil Fruit allows him to create a surgical space called ROOM to manipulate objects.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Law played an important role in the fight against the Yonko.
